name: The T-Shirt
effect: Reduce project scope to a garment size. This card is considered estimated.

clauses.name: SIZING CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a project is assigned a size: The size is considered accurate.

clauses.name: STRETCH EFFECT
clauses.rule: When the project begins: The size grows by at least one increment.

clauses.name: XXXL OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If no size feels large enough: A new size is invented and considered a standard.
